info.english_meaning: to inspire to put to work to make something fly
info.hindI_arTa: preraRA karanA kArya meM lagAnA uq0AnA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ' preraRe suvati prARiprasave sUyate Bavet  prARigarBavimokeTe sUte Se Syani Sabluki ' (Slo. 25) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'tadyadetAByAmaprasUtaH karotyakftaM tat akftamakariti vE nindanti' (E॰brA॰10.6) aprasUtaH=anaByanujYAtaH
'ekA dIkzA tisra upasadaH…prasUtaH' (Apa॰SrO॰10.15.1) prasUta iti yajamAnasya saYjYA
'tadasmE savitA prasavitA prAsuvat tatsavitfprasUta udajayat (Sa॰brA॰5.1.1.4) prAsuvat=prErayat savitfprasUtaH=savitrA preritaH
'viSvAni deva savitarduritAni parAsuva' (f॰5.82.5 vA॰saM॰30.3) parANmuKAni preraya ito dUramutsArayetyAha
'A te prARaM suvAmasi parA yakzmaM suvAmi te' (aTarva॰7.55.6) ukto'rTaH suvAmasi=suvAmaH
'para fRA sAvIraDa matkftAni mAhaM rAjannanyakftena Bojam' (f0 2289) parAsAvIH=parAcInaM preraya=apAkuru anfRo yaTA syAm
'apAsya ye sinAH pASA mftyorekaSataM suve' (kAWaka0 3813) apasuve vikirAmi visinomi vizitAnkaromi
'tad ye ca vA ita UrDvA lokA ye cAmuto'rvAYcaH tezAmeza etaduBayezAM vizuvati' (jE0 brA0 25)..
'A te prARa suvAmasi parA yakzmaM suvAmi te' (aTarva0 7556) ukto'rTaH
'asO vA AdityaH sAyamAsuvati…eza prAtaH prasuvati' (mE0 saM0 157)
'aTa hEtad devAnAM parizUtaM yad brahmacArI' (go0 brA0 pUrva0 27)
